evidence: "I love the mystery, the mother daughter relationship but most of all the hard working, thinking relationship of Rizzoli and Isles."
"if you like cop shows and romance.. as well as extremely well developed characters... this show has it all."
"the relationships and characters are heart warming and the cases very believable and interesting to solve..."
"it is mission impossible without so much shoot em up stuff.. and actual thought goes into the solution..."
"I felt such a connection with each character and can see real life interactions happening from pain, jealousy, wanting to be famous..."
"a good way to understand my mother a lot of the times.. and to see some of the things that I do as well.. both as a grown child and as an adult"
"Great material and great acting.. love the fact that it mirrors much of what is going on in the world today."
"wish I hadn't waited so long.. what did I expect with Mr. Sorkin doing the writing.. should have known...."
"I hear there are complaints that Sorkin is not reaching us.. but he sure is reaching me.."
"the playful romance between the lead characters complete with the challenges of two very different personalities makes me chuckle..."
"each has a razor sharp sense of humor with great come back lines..."
"makes me chuckle, recognize, and feel so good about humanity and love."
"I felt such a connection with each character..."

summary: The user has a strong preference for mystery and romance genres, particularly enjoying character-driven narratives with emotional depth. They appreciate high production quality and have a notable loyalty to Aaron Sorkin's work, indicating a taste for well-crafted storytelling that resonates on a personal level.
